{{Quote|Who would have thought that a Force-adept could be found on this insignificant planet? […] This meeting is a stroke of luck for me. My master will surely reward me with my lightsaber once I kill you.|The Sith Governor to Revan|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />}}
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] '''Sith Governor''' was appointed to govern [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] when the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] conquered the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and [[Gender/Legends|his]] companions entered his room inside the [[Tarisian military base|Sith Base]] seeking the launch codes that would allow them to escape the planet, the governor sensed Revan's strength in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Seeing an opportunity to earn a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] from his [[Sith Master/Legends|Sith masters]], he attacked with a [[vibro double-blade]]. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the ensuing skirmish by Revan and his allies.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
